# SentriScope public documentation

> Sanitized public docs for search engines and LLM crawlers.
> Not application source code. Not internal engineering SSOT.

## Primary pages

- [Platform: What is SentriScope?](platform/WHAT_IS_SENTRISCOPE.md): Product positioning and scope.
- [Platform: What SentriScope is not](platform/WHAT_SENTRISCOPE_IS_NOT.md): Explicit non-goals and boundaries.
- [Platform overview](platform/PLATFORM_OVERVIEW.md): High-level platform capabilities.
- [Product maturity](platform/PRODUCT_MATURITY.md): Honest maturity labels for capabilities.
- [Index](INDEX.md): Catalog of public documentation entries.
